attacking_style: Opportunistic breakaway rider who saves energy for late sprint execution, launching final effort inside 1.5km and waiting until final 200m to attack companion.
team_tactics: Insufficient data to establish team tactical patterns from single race observation.
terrain_preference: Capable on uphill sprint finishes where tactical positioning can compensate for pure power deficits.
vulnerability: Likely struggles as pure sprinter against top-tier fast finishers; relies on breakaway situations to avoid direct confrontation with peloton sprinters.
key_patterns: Single observation limits pattern identification; requires additional race data for reliable tactical signature.
form_trajectory: unknown: Only one race observation from 2018 prevents meaningful form assessment or trend analysis.
